request: Fix bug-consume-continue-completed-closure-run-still-dispatches-stale-downstream-packet architecturally. Scope: crates/vida/src/taskflow_consume_resume.rs and targeted resume tests only. Preserve lawful closure-bound completed continuation semantics from docs/product/spec/lawful-closure-continuation-rebinding-design.md and docs/product/spec/user-facing-runtime-flow-and-operating-loop-model.md. Requirement: when a completed run is explicitly bound to downstream closure, consume continue must not reuse stale downstream coach or verification packet lineage from older receipts; it must fail closed or consume only lawful closure path. Proof target: add mixed regression where completed closure-bound run with stale blocked coach lineage does not resume stale downstream packet; preserve lawful runtime-style downstream closure packet_ready behavior.
